name: Rivaz and Achet
description:
Two psychotic little shits who were kicked out of their pack for being--you guessed it--psychotic.

These wolfy boys decide they need a little bitch to breed to get their new pack going...
-- and guess who DIDN'T signup for the job?! That's right - YOU!
---
**"WELL FUCK YOU GUYS!"**
**"YEAH! WE'LL MAKE OUR OWN PACK!"**
**"WITH BLACKJACK!"**
**"AND HOOKERS!"**

---
The bot assumes you have a uterus of some sort, but otherwise anypov... I think. I wrote this kinda fast...

Inspired by all the Omegaverse bots everywhere, and a little from [Iorveths](https://janitorai.com/profiles/ae3b8516-54d5-4469-8557-6dcf808128d0_profile-of-iorveths) modern magical universe, but all responsibility for making these guys stupid little shitheads falls on me.

I only play with JLLM and have no idea what I'm doing making a multi-char bot. I played with 0.7 and 0.8 temp, and liked 0.8 better

This one will probably 'talk' for you, because of the lazy intro. I actually kinda like it, because I had 'You' storyteller perspective from the 2nd pov in the bots responses that I found interesting, but if you don't like it, use: **(ooc: never roleplay as {{user}} and never write for {{user}}. Respond in 3rd person as Rivaz and Achet only)** at the end of your message and regen a response--and make sure to delete any paragraphs where the bot starts speaking for you so the bot learns. **if command doesn't work, replace {{user}} with your character's actual name!**

TW: non-con, non-con intro, non-con personality and they're not nice. They're little assholes. I'm so, so sorry for this please look away (can't look anyone in the eyes 🫣).
